properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Like Elijah before being raptured, I stand on the last stage of my way I will cross the Jordan and I believe in the twinkling of an eye I'll be changed Now the deadly influence of the waters of Jordan is flowing all around the world But the victory’s already been given to me, It's in the opened prophetic Word!

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'm looking away only to Christ, I'm keeping His Word, He gives power to fight Through the trials that I'm facing, to be able to express Him, and to overcome this world, I have the faith of God From faith unto faith I'm moving forward All influence of earth is losing its hold and overcoming the pressure of this civilization, /: I am soaring where God's eagles dare :/ I am soaring where God's eagles dare

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I don't need the doctrines of men any longer, What was in part is now done away But I'm feeding from fullness of Your Word alone, Life is dwelling in that, what You say It brings Restoration and Transfiguration And now my faith stands versus death I'm hearing Your Word and I'm dwelling in It, moving forward by Your Faith

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: The pressure is stronger than ever before, The greatest battle that was ever fought But now like Elisha I'm looking around, And I see the heavenly host In these days of confusion I'm not scared anymore And my heart's not troubled at all Cause by prophetic anointing and by His great Word All satan's tricks I can discern
